description: Fix error handling (use ToolError instead of plain Error) and Retry-After header parsing in the Figma plugin.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/figma && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Use ToolError.notFound instead of plain Error in Figma tools
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want Figma tool errors to use ToolError factory methods so that the MCP dispatch chain properly categorizes errors for AI agents.
acceptanceCriteria: get-current-user.ts line 24 throws ToolError.notFound('User not found in session state') instead of new Error('User not found in session state')
get-team-info.ts line 26 throws ToolError.notFound('Team not found') instead of new Error('Team not found')
ToolError is imported from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk in both files
cd plugins/figma && npm run build passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Two files need fixing:

1. plugins/figma/src/tools/get-current-user.ts line 24:
   Change: `if (!me) throw new Error('User not found in session state');`
   To: `if (!me) throw ToolError.notFound('User not found in session state');`
   Add `ToolError` to the import from '@opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk' (line 1).

2. plugins/figma/src/tools/get-team-info.ts line 26:
   Change: `if (!team) throw new Error('Team not found');`
   To: `if (!team) throw ToolError.notFound('Team not found');`
   Add `ToolError` to the import from '@opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk' (line 1).

The consequence of plain Error is that the MCP dispatch chain cannot properly categorize these as 'not_found' errors. AI agents receive category=internal instead of category=not_found.

userStories.title: Use SDK parseRetryAfterMs in Figma API caller
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the Figma plugin to correctly parse Retry-After headers in both seconds and HTTP-date formats so that AI agents receive valid retry timing metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: Line ~219 in figma-api.ts uses parseRetryAfterMs from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk instead of `Number(retryAfter) * 1000`
The import for parseRetryAfterMs is added to the existing @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk import line
HTTP-date format Retry-After values are correctly parsed instead of producing NaN
cd plugins/figma && npm run build passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/figma && npm run format:check passes
